meanings.definition: look at with a fixed gaze
examples: The girl glared at the man who tried to make a pass at her

meanings.definition: look angry or sullen, wrinkle one's forehead, as if to signal disapproval
showing a brooding ill humor; ; ; ; ; ; - Bruce Bliven
examples: the proverbially dour New England Puritan
a saturnine, almost misanthropic young genius
